title: Weather Today [24 May, 2026]: Check IMD Rain Predictions, Heat Alert, Monsoon & Thunderstorms Across Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Chennai, Karnataka, Rajasthan, Jammu, Hyderabad & More - Full City-Wise Forecast - Dailyhunt
full_text:
India Weather Update Today:India is witnessing two completely different weather systems at the same time while large parts of North, Central and Western India continue to struggle under a severe heatwave, southern and northeastern states are preparing for heavy rain as the Southwest Monsoon steadily advances.
Temperatures have crossed 47°C in some regions, while several coastal and hill states are already reporting thunderstorms and intense rainfall activity.
According to the India Meteorological Department (IMD), severe heatwave conditions are expected to continue across Northwest and Central India through the coming week and at the same time, monsoon activity over the Arabian Sea and Bay of Bengal is strengthening rapidly, bringing moisture-laden winds into southern India.
Will it Rain or Snow in the Hills?
Higher reaches of Jammu and Kashmir, Himachal Pradesh and Uttarakhand may witness light rain and isolated snowfall in elevated mountain areas over the next 48 hours. Srinagar remains unusually cool compared to northern plains.
Srinagar Weather: Minimum: 9°C & Maximum: 17°C
Tourist destinations in Gulmarg and Sonamarg could experience brief snowfall during late-night hours due to western disturbances interacting with cold mountain winds.
Why Is The Heat Building Up So Fast Across India?
Meteorologists say multiple atmospheric factors are fueling the heat surge:
- Dry northwesterly winds are dominating northern India.
- Rain-bearing systems remain absent over the plains.
- Delayed pre-monsoon showers have intensified land heating.
- Urban heat island effects are worsening temperatures in metro cities.
- Climate data shows India recorded its warmest February-April period in recent years.
Brahmapuri in Maharashtra touched 47.2°C, making it among the hottest places in the country this week.
Where are the Heat Wave Alerts?
- Red Alert: Delhi, Rajasthan, Haryana, Vidarbha, Uttar Pradesh
Health authorities warn that prolonged exposure may increase risks of dehydration, heat exhaustion and heatstroke, especially among children and elderly citizens.
Is Monsoon Arrived?
Yes, the Southwest Monsoon has advanced into:
The IMD expects further advancement into Karnataka, Tamil Nadu and northeastern states within the next 3 to 4 days.
Delhi-NCR Weather Today
Minimum: 30°C | Maximum: 45°C
Delhi-NCR remains under intense heatwave conditions with strong dry winds during afternoon hour and wind speeds may reach 30 km/h, while humidity remains low. Heat index values could feel even harsher during peak afternoon hours.
Chennai Weather Today
Minimum: 30°C | Maximum: 34°C
Chennai is expected to remain humid with chances of isolated coastal showers while sea breeze conditions may offer temporary evening relief.
Mumbai Weather Today
Minimum: 30°C | Maximum: 33°C
Mumbai continues to experience warm and sticky weather conditions while cloud cover is expected to increase gradually as monsoon currents strengthen offshore.
Hyderabad Weather Today
Minimum: 26°C | Maximum: 41°C
Hyderabad remains hot and dry with partly cloudy skies and afternoon thunderstorms may develop in isolated areas.
Karnataka Weather Today
Minimum: 23°C | Maximum: 35°C
Several districts in Karnataka may witness thunderstorms and moderate rainfall due to advancing monsoon activity while coastal Karnataka could receive heavier showers later this week.
Uttar Pradesh Weather Today
Minimum: 29°C | Maximum: 46°C
Heatwave conditions continue across most districts including Lucknow, Kanpur and Prayagraj while hot winds locally known as "loo" are expected during daytime.
Rajasthan Weather Today
Minimum: 32°C | Maximum: 43°C
Jaipur and surrounding areas remain extremely hot and dry. Western Rajasthan may witness dust storms in isolated pockets.
Jammu and Kashmir Weather Today
Minimum: 9°C | Maximum: 17°C
Cooler temperatures persist across Kashmir Valley while cloud movement over hilly regions may trigger evening showers.
Punjab Weather Today
Minimum: 27°C | Maximum: 44°C
Punjab continues to face severe heat conditions, especially in Chandigarh and surrounding districts while the temperature may climb further during the week.
Ahmedabad Weather Today
Minimum: 30°C | Maximum: 42°C
Ahmedabad remains under hot and dry conditions while warm nighttime temperatures are increasing discomfort levels.

FAQ's: All About Today's Weather
1. Are There Any Travel Or Safety Warnings?
Yes. Fishermen have been advised not to venture into parts of the Arabian Sea and Bay of Bengal due to rough sea conditions.
2. Will Temperatures Rise Across The Country?
Northwest and Central India may see temperatures rise by 2°C to 4°C over the next few days.
3. Will There Be Any Rain Today?
Yes. Southern and northeastern states are likely to receive moderate to heavy rainfall.
4. Where Will It Snow Today?
Light snowfall is possible in isolated higher-altitude areas of Jammu and Kashmir.
5. Is Delhi Under Heatwave Alert?
Yes. Delhi remains under severe heatwave warning with temperatures nearing 45°C to 47°C.
Disclaimer: Weather forecasts are for guidance only. Conditions may change rapidly. Always check local authorities for emergencies and travel alerts.
